name: Helping Hand for Relief and Development
mission: Helping Hand for Relief and Development is a global humanitarian relief and development organization responding to human sufferings in emergency and disastrous situations anywhere all over the world regardless race, gender, ethnicity, class, location, religion, color, cultural diversity and social background; with special focus on countries where the massive population is living below the poverty line. In addition to our emergency relief efforts in natural or man made disaster areas, we also work on long term relief and development programs like livelihood, economic empowerment, orphan and widows support program and skill development program.
theoryOfChange: Stated focus areas include immediate response and aid to disaster stricken areas, and offering a path to self-sufficiency through education support and skills trainings (Better Livelihood).

scoreSummary: Helping Hand for Relief and Development shows strong alignment and good impact, with zakat compliance (minor risk deductions applied).
zakatClaimEvidence: Zakat given to Helping Hand USA is distributed to those who need it most, in accordance with Islamic guidelines, and funds to support numerous projects worldwide. Your Zakat payments allow Helping Hand USA to help those who need it the most. Humanitarian organizations like Helping Hand for Relief and Development (HHRD) work tirelessly to ensure that Zakat reaches those who are religiously eligible to receive it. (Source: http://www.hhrd.org)

ui_signals_v1.recommendation_rationale: Good donor alignment with manageable risk. Evidence quality is solid but still evolving in places.

keyConcerns.headline: 32% of reported revenue is noncash (gifts-in-kind)
keyConcerns.detail: Noncash contributions inflate reported program ratios. Cash-adjusted metrics better reflect actual spending.

keyConcerns.headline: No outcome measurement or metrics tracking

all_citations.claim: HHRD holds a 100.100.0/100 from Charity Navigator score and a 91.2% program expense ratio.
The organization provides integrated resources and disaster response for people in need.
HHRD operates youth empowerment programs as part of its development initiatives.
The charity manages physical rehabilitation centers for children and adults with disabilities.
Total revenue was $89,337,007 with a fundraising efficiency of $0.06 per $1 raised.
HHRD is Zakat-eligible and offers various donation options for humanitarian relief.
The organization offers volunteer opportunities to engage the community in its mission.

baseline_narrative.amal_score_rationale: HHRD earns a strong overall rating due to its perfect financial health score and high alignment with humanitarian needs, though its impact score is moderated by the high cost of direct service delivery.
areas_for_improvement: Enhancing data confidence through more frequent third-party impact evaluations.
Improving the cost-per-beneficiary ratio for direct service programs to maximize resource reach.

dimension_explanations.alignment: The organization shows high alignment (41/50) for donors seeking to support urgent humanitarian causes, particularly within the Muslim community due to its Zakat-eligible status [12]. Its diverse programming, ranging from youth empowerment to disability support, establishes a robust track record of addressing multifaceted poverty issues [5][13].
dimension_explanations.impact: HHRD demonstrates moderate impact effectiveness with a score of 32/50, characterized by direct service delivery in programs such as Orphan Sponsorship and physical rehabilitation [3][6]. While the organization maintains a high program expense ratio of 91.2%, the calculated cost per beneficiary is approximately $1,076.55, reflecting the intensive nature of its long-term support initiatives [1][7].

baseline_narrative.headline: Helping Hand for Relief and Development provides comprehensive humanitarian aid and orphan support with exceptional financial transparency.
strengths: Maintains an exceptional program expense ratio of 91.2%, ensuring the vast majority of funds reach those in need.
Highly efficient fundraising operations, spending only $0.06 per $1 raised.
Strong liquidity with 10.4 months of working capital available to sustain operations.
Recognized as Zakat-eligible, providing a trusted avenue for Muslim donors to fulfill their religious obligations.
baseline_narrative.summary: Helping Hand for Relief and Development (HHRD) is a global humanitarian organization dedicated to serving people in need through disaster response and integrated development programs [3]. The organization reported a total revenue of $89,337,007 and maintains a high level of fiscal responsibility, earning a perfect 100.100.0/100 from Charity Navigator [1][7].

rich_narrative.amal_score_rationale: HHRD earns a strong overall rating due to its perfect financial health score and high alignment with humanitarian needs, though its impact score is moderated by the high cost of direct service delivery.

areas_for_improvement.detail: While HHRD tracks outputs, it should <cite id="10">seek external evaluation or track outcomes over at least 3 years</cite> to move beyond unverified impact claims.
The organization would benefit from <cite id="10">documenting a clear theory of change</cite> with an explicit causal pathway to better communicate long-term effectiveness.

<cite id="10">Average cost-per-beneficiary of $1076.55</cite> for humanitarian services
case_against.summary: The primary limitation is the <cite id="10">unverified status of evidence and outcomes</cite> despite large-scale operations.

confidence.data_freshness: Financial data from 2023; Ratings from late 2024
confidence.notes: Very high financial transparency; impact evidence is the only major gap.

alignment.explanation: Strong fit for Muslim donors as a <cite id="12">zakat-eligible organization</cite> serving <cite id="7">masakin and fuqara</cite> in <cite id="3">Muslim-majority regions</cite>.
alignment.improvement: The charity could <cite id="10">expand services to underserved geographies</cite> with limited existing nonprofit coverage.

credibility.explanation: Donors can trust HHRD due to its <cite id="1">100.0/100 from Charity Navigator rating</cite> and the fact that it <cite id="11">meets all 20 BBB Standards for Charity Accountability</cite>.
credibility.improvement: To further strengthen credibility, the organization could publish more detailed third-party impact assessments.

impact.explanation: Operations are highly efficient with a <cite id="7">90.2% program ratio</cite> and <cite id="1">10.4 months of working capital</cite>.
impact.improvement: Impact measurement would benefit from <cite id="10">tracking outcomes over at least 3 years</cite> and commissioning independent evaluations.

grantmaking_profile.grant_strategy: Distributes significant funding to foreign implementing partners for humanitarian relief.

rich_narrative.headline: Helping Hand for Relief and Development provides comprehensive humanitarian aid and orphan support with exceptional financial transparency.

ideal_donor_profile.best_for_summary: Best for donors who want to fulfill zakat obligations through a large-scale, institutionally mature organization with a perfect financial transparency record.
donor_motivations: Want to ensure <cite id="7">90% of their donation</cite> goes directly to programs
Seek a charity that <cite id="11">meets all 20 BBB accountability standards</cite>
Prioritize aid to <cite id="3">Muslim-majority regions in crisis</cite>
Value long-term stability and <cite id="1">strong working capital reserves</cite>
giving_considerations: Large-scale operations mean gifts are part of a <cite id="2">$94 million annual budget</cite>
The organization is an <cite id="7">active grantmaker</cite>, funding local partners globally
Evidence of impact is currently based on internal tracking rather than RCTs
ideal_donor_profile.not_ideal_for: Donors seeking small-scale, grassroots organizations or those who require rigorous, third-party academic evidence of impact before giving.

impact_evidence.evidence_grade_explanation: Grade C reflects that while the organization tracks outputs and has <cite id="1">perfect accountability scores</cite>, it lacks <cite id="10">verified outcome tracking over multiple years</cite>.
impact_evidence.theory_of_change_summary: HHRD creates impact by <cite id="3">integrating resources for immediate disaster response</cite> and <cite id="5">long-term development programs</cite> like youth empowerment and healthcare.
impact_evidence.why_evidence_matters: Rigorous evidence ensures that the $1,076 spent per beneficiary is achieving the intended long-term life improvements.

long_term_outlook.room_for_funding_explanation: With a <cite id="10">3-year revenue CAGR of 8.2%</cite> and expanding programs in Gaza and Lebanon, HHRD can absorb significant additional capital.

organizational_capacity.geographic_reach: Global (Jordan, Pakistan, Afghanistan, Palestine, Lebanon, Kenya, etc.)

peer_comparison.differentiator: HHRD distinguishes itself with a <cite id="7">90.2% program ratio</cite>, which is higher than the <cite id="10">peer median of 89.8%</cite> and the <cite id="10">industry standard of 75%</cite>.

strengths.detail: HHRD holds a <cite id="1">perfect 100/100 overall score from Charity Navigator</cite> and <cite id="11">meets all 20 BBB Wise Giving Alliance Standards</cite> for accountability.
The organization maintains a <cite id="7">91.2% program expense ratio</cite>, which exceeds the <cite id="10">peer program ratio median of 89.8%</cite>.
The charity possesses <cite id="1">10.4 months of working capital</cite>, ensuring significant resilience against funding fluctuations.

strengths_deep_dive: HHRD's operational model is characterized by high-volume grantmaking and direct service delivery. In 2023, the organization distributed <cite id="7">$50,953,951 in total grants</cite>, with <cite id="7">$48,691,370 directed toward foreign recipients</cite> in crisis zones. This scale is supported by a <cite id="1">fundraising efficiency of $0.05 to $0.06 per $1 raised</cite>, allowing the vast majority of contributions to reach beneficiaries directly. Governance is robust, featuring a <cite id="1">100% independent board</cite> and a <cite id="11">comprehensive conflict of interest policy</cite>.
rich_narrative.summary: Helping Hand for Relief and Development (HHRD) is a global humanitarian organization dedicated to serving humanity by integrating resources for people in need through disaster response and long-term development. The organization reported <cite id="2">total revenue of $94,048,415</cite> in 2023, reflecting a <cite id="10">3-year revenue CAGR of 8.2%</cite>. HHRD maintains an exceptional <cite id="1">overall score of 100.0/100 from Charity Navigator</cite>, driven by a <cite id="1">perfect 100/100 Accountability & Finance beacon</cite>. The charity operates with high efficiency, allocating <cite id="7">90.2% of its budget to program expenses</cite> while spending only <cite id="1">$0.06 per $1 raised</cite> in fundraising. Its global reach extends to regions including <cite id="3">Jordan, Pakistan, Afghanistan, and Palestine</cite>, where it provides <cite id="6">comprehensive rehabilitation</cite>, <cite id="5">youth empowerment</cite>, and <cite id="3">shelter relief</cite>. As a <cite id="12">zakat-eligible organization</cite>, HHRD serves the <cite id="7">fuqara and masakin</cite> asnaf categories, making it a primary choice for Muslim donors seeking to fulfill religious obligations through a highly transparent and established institution.
